match_hot.title: Hot Match Found!
match_hot.heading: Hot Match Found!
match_hot.intro: Great news! We found a highly compatible listing that matches your preferences. This is a hot match - don't miss out!
match_hot.receiving_notice: You're receiving this because you enabled hot match notifications.

match_mutual.title: Mutual Match Found!
match_mutual.preview: Perfect exchange opportunity with {{name}}! You can both help each other - {{score}}% compatibility.
match_mutual.heading: Mutual Match!
match_mutual.intro: We found a mutual exchange opportunity with {{partner}}. You can both help each other - this is a win-win!
match_mutual.rare_notice: Mutual matches are rare! This is a win-win opportunity where both parties benefit from the exchange.
match_mutual.receiving_notice: You're receiving this because you enabled mutual match notifications.

announcement.template_description: Spring 2026 announcement covering marketplace, donations, identity verification, volunteering payments, federation, languages, SEO, and security.
announcement.subject: What's new in {{community}} — Spring 2026
announcement.preview_text: Marketplace, donations, identity verification, federation, 11 languages, and more.
announcement.heading: What's new in {{community}}
announcement.intro: Hi {{name}}, the platform has grown a lot in the last few weeks. Here's a quick tour of what you can do today.
announcement.section_marketplace_body: A new standalone marketplace for classifieds, with Stripe Connect payouts and AI-powered reply suggestions.
announcement.section_donations_body: One-off and recurring donations via Stripe, with full dashboards and receipts for organisations.
announcement.section_identity_body: Optional Stripe Identity flow with document and selfie checks, plus a verified-member badge on your profile.
announcement.section_volunteering_body: Organisations can now top up a volunteer wallet and pay volunteers directly for approved hours.
announcement.section_federation_body: The full Komunitin federation spec is live — members, listings, events, and reputation now travel with you across connected communities.
announcement.section_languages_body: We now support English, Irish, German, French, Italian, Portuguese, Spanish, Dutch, Polish, Japanese, and Arabic with full right-to-left layout.
announcement.section_seo_body: Public pages are now pre-rendered at build time for search engines, and we've added structured data and sitemaps across the platform.
announcement.section_security_body: Passkeys, CSP nonces, a CORS allowlist, and a much deeper test suite across payments, webhooks, and federation.
announcement.thanks: Thank you for being part of this community — more to come soon.
